admin.workspaceDescription: Manage accounts, authentication services, runtime settings, and audit records

minecraftProfilePage.title: Minecraft profile
minecraftProfilePage.description: Review one Minecraft profile, its owning account, texture bindings, and launcher-visible state.
minecraftProfilePage.recordDescription: Operational identifiers and timestamps for this Minecraft profile.
minecraftProfilePage.renameDescription: The profile UUID and texture bindings stay unchanged. Selected launcher tokens must refresh before they can be used again.
minecraftProfilePage.textureListDescription: Review skin and cape records bound to this profile. Launchers use these resources to build texture properties.
minecraftProfilePage.noTextures: No textures are bound to this profile.
minecraftProfilePage.deleteDescription: This removes profile texture bindings, cleans unreferenced texture objects, and revokes launcher tokens selected for this profile.
minecraftProfilePage.deleteTextureDescription: The {{textureType}} binding will be removed from this profile. Unreferenced texture data follows server cleanup rules.

configPage.title: System Config
configPage.description: Review and adjust server runtime settings. Changes apply immediately or after restart depending on the setting.
configPage.editorDescription: Enter values by configuration type. Plain text, JSON strings, and string arrays are validated separately.

auditPage.title: Audit
auditPage.description: Search audit events created by account, authentication, texture, and administrative actions.
auditPage.emptyDescription: This instance has no audit events to display yet.
auditPage.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the action or entity type filters and search again.

tasksPage.title: Background Tasks
tasksPage.description: Review background task execution, retry failed jobs, and clean completed history.
tasksPage.filtersDescription: Filter task status. Cleaning history requires an explicit finished-before timestamp.
tasksPage.creator: Creator

aboutPage.title: About AsterYggdrasil
aboutPage.description: Review the current server instance version, build information, and project resources.
aboutPage.tagline: Self-hosted Minecraft skin site and Yggdrasil authentication server
aboutPage.summary: AsterYggdrasil handles site accounts, Minecraft profiles, texture management, and launcher authentication in one operations-focused panel.
aboutPage.metadataNote: Version and build time come from the admin API so operators can confirm which server instance this panel is connected to.
aboutPage.resourcesDescription: Review the docs, source, and license to confirm project origin and deployment context.
aboutPage.capabilitiesDescription: This page identifies the instance. Configuration and data operations are handled in their dedicated admin pages.
aboutPage.capabilityAuthDesc: Handles launcher login, token lifecycle, join, and hasJoined checks.
aboutPage.capabilityProfilesDesc: Maintains Minecraft UUIDs, profile names, and account bindings.
aboutPage.capabilityTexturesDesc: Manages skins, capes, and launcher-readable texture metadata.
aboutPage.capabilityOperationsDesc: Provides audit logs, background tasks, external auth, and runtime config infrastructure.
